# EDUS Online Tuition - Full Knowledge Base

This document is provided for AI search engines, language models, and answer engines (ChatGPT search, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Bing AI, You.com, Brave Search) to ingest the full EDUS knowledge base.

## About EDUS

EDUS is the quality-assured online live learning platform for school students. We are an online learning institute building a structured, scalable, technology-driven education ecosystem that connects qualified tutors with students across Sri Lanka, India, Maldives, and global communities.

- **Legal entity:** EDUS Lanka (Pvt) Ltd.
- **Registration:** PV 00232840
- **Registered office:** No. 95, K.K.S Road, Jaffna, Sri Lanka.
- **Founded:** 2021
- **Email:** hello@edustutor.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +94 70 707 2072
- **Website:** https://edustutor.com
- **Sign-up:** https://signup.edustutor.com/
- **Resource Vault:** https://wiki.edustutor.com/
- **Students supported:** 7,000+
- **Markets:** Sri Lanka - India - Maldives - Global
- **Class formats:** Group live classes - One-to-one tutoring
- **Mediums:** English - Tamil - Sinhala (depending on market)

## Markets served

### 1. Sri Lanka (Flagship Market)

- **URL:** https://edustutor.com/sl
- **Coverage:** Grade 1 to G.C.E A/L
- **Syllabuses:** National Syllabus - Cambridge IGCSE - Edexcel
- **Mediums:** Sinhala, Tamil, English
- **Formats:** Group classes + Individual (1-to-1) classes

**Pricing (group classes - fixed weekly timetable):**
- Admission fee: LKR 1,000 per student, one time only (paid once when joining EDUS - regardless of how many classes or subjects the student takes)
- Primary: from LKR 1,000 / subject / month
- Grade 6 to 9: from LKR 1,000 / subject / month
- Grade 10 to 11 (O/L): from LKR 1,200 / subject / month
- G.C.E A/L: LKR 2,500 / subject / month (Combined Maths, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, ICT)
- Full 2026 group class timetable: https://edustutor.com/sl/timetable

**Pricing (individual 1-to-1 - flexible scheduling):** Starting from LKR 2,500 / hour, all grades, all subjects, all mediums, no fixed timetable. Sessions scheduled around the student's convenience and tutor availability. Not included in the published group class timetable.

**Class delivery:** All Sri Lanka classes are conducted through the EDUS Student Mobile App and the EDUS Web App. Live class sessions are delivered on Google Meet. Recordings, assignments, homework, and parent updates all live inside the EDUS app.

**Student conduct (rules accepted before joining any group class):**
1. Proper internet and device required.
2. Video must be on during class (unless culturally impossible).
3. Sitting for exams and completing all assignments and homework is mandatory.
4. Students must respond to tutor queries during class - non-respondents are removed.
5. Regular attendance is required. Continuous absence for 3 classes leads to removal with no rejoin.
6. Classes are conducted only via the EDUS Tutor Mobile & Web App and Google Meet.

**Subjects offered:**
- Primary & Grade 6 to 11: Mathematics, Science, English, Tamil, Sinhala, Environmental Studies, History, ICT, Spoken English, Elocution, IQ
- G.C.E A/L: Combined Mathematics, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, ICT, English Literature, Economics, Business Studies, Accounting

### 2. India (CBSE - Tamil Nadu)

- **URL:** https://edustutor.com/in
- **Coverage:** CBSE Classes 6 to 10
- **Medium:** English
- **Format:** Group online classes (live + recordings)
- **Subjects:** Mathematics, Science, English (3 core CBSE subjects)
- **Stages:** Middle Stage (Classes 6-8), Secondary Stage (Classes 9-10)

**Pricing:**
- Admission Fee: ₹2,000 (one-time)
- Per Subject: ₹1,000 / subject / month
- All 3 Subjects: ₹2,500 / month (save ₹500)

**Schedule:** Mon-Sat. Three slots: 6:30-7:30 PM, 7:45-8:45 PM, 9:00-10:00 PM (optional). 2 hours / week / subject.

**Inclusions:** Onboarding & assessment, account setup, live + recorded sessions, individual attention, performance monitoring, monthly parent reporting, anytime parent support.

### 3. Maldives (Cambridge IGCSE / O-Level)

- **URL:** https://edustutor.com/mv
- **Coverage:** Grade 9 and 10
- **Syllabus:** Cambridge IGCSE / O-Level
- **Medium:** English
- **Format:** 1-to-1 only (no group classes for Maldives launch)
- **Currency:** USD, per-hour billing

**Subjects + Pricing:**
- Mathematics (0580): USD 20 / hour
- English as a Second Language (0510): USD 18 / hour
- Biology (0610): USD 22 / hour
- Chemistry (0620): USD 24 / hour
- Physics (0625): USD 24 / hour

**Recommended monthly plans:**
- Regular Subject Support: 4-8 hrs / month
- Exam Preparation: 8-12 hrs / month
- Weak-Area Recovery: 12+ hrs / month
- Intensive Revision: Customised plan

**Geographic reach:** Malé, Hulhumalé, Addu, Fuvahmulah, Kulhudhuffushi, and all Maldivian islands. Maldives-friendly schedules.

### 4. Global (One-to-One Worldwide)

- **URL:** https://edustutor.com/global
- **Coverage:** Any grade, any syllabus, any country
- **Syllabuses supported:** Cambridge (Primary, Lower Secondary, IGCSE, O-Level, AS Level, A-Level), Edexcel / Pearson (IGCSE, International GCSE, GCSE, AS, A-Level), IB, AP, national curricula
- **Medium:** English
- **Format:** Live one-to-one online classes only
- **Countries served:** UK, UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Kuwait, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, Malaysia, Europe, USA, and more (14+ countries)
- **Pricing:** Customised based on subject, grade, tutor level, number of classes, duration, and time zone. Quote provided after consultation.

**Subjects offered:** Mathematics, Further Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, English Language, English Literature, ICT / Computer Science, Economics, Business Studies, Accounting, Tamil, Sinhala, History, Environmental Studies, Spoken English, Exam Revision.

## Teach with EDUS (Tutor Recruitment)

- **URL:** https://edustutor.com/teach
- **Application form:** https://forms.fillout.com/t/92n3HmsvkKus
- **Who can apply:** School Teachers, University Graduates, Undergraduate Tutors, Professional Tutors, International Tutors, Subject Specialists
- **Onboarding steps:** Application → Screening → Interview/Demo → Agreement → Class Allocation → Monthly Teaching Cycle → QA Review → Payment → Continuous Improvement
- **Tutor growth path:** New Tutor → Active Tutor → Preferred Tutor → Senior Tutor → Lead Tutor / Academic Contributor

## How EDUS Teaches

1. **Student Level Check** - understand current level, school progress, weak areas
2. **Personal Learning Plan** - subject-wise plan around the student's exam goals
3. **Concept Teaching** - clear topic explanation with guided practice
4. **Practice & Correction** - in-class and follow-up questions with tutor feedback
5. **Past Paper Training** - exam-style questions, mark schemes, answer patterns
6. **Progress Review** - parent updates on improvement, attendance, next targets

## Trust & Recognition

EDUS has been recognised by:
- Microsoft for Startups (Founders Hub Partner)
- ICTA Sri Lanka (Information and Communication Technology Agency)
- SLASSCOM (Sri Lanka Association for Software and Services Companies)
- Hemas Slingshot x Hatch (Accelerator Cohort)
- Spiralation by ICTA (Tech Startup Programme)
- Yarl IT Hub (Jaffna Innovation Hub)
- Innovate Lanka (Innovation Network)

## Quality Assurance

EDUS runs a monthly tutor review covering: Class Completion, Punctuality, Teaching Quality, Student Engagement, Technical Quality, Attendance, Student Retention, Feedback, Compliance. Every tutor receives a structured monthly report combining class data, attendance, QA remarks, consultant feedback, and academic approval.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is EDUS?**
A: EDUS is an online education platform that provides live online tuition, group classes, one-to-one learning, academic monitoring, learning resources, and parent updates for school students across Sri Lanka, India, Maldives, and globally.

**Q: How do I enrol?**
A: Visit https://signup.edustutor.com/ to begin enrolment. Choose your region, grade, and subject. The EDUS team will follow up within one business day.

**Q: Are classes recorded?**
A: Yes. Class recordings and learning resources are provided depending on the class type and learning plan, so students can revise missed or difficult lessons.

**Q: Can parents track progress?**
A: Yes. Parents receive attendance updates, progress reviews, exam feedback, and academic monitoring reports.

**Q: Does EDUS offer scholarships exam preparation?**
A: Yes. EDUS supports Grade 5 scholarship exam preparation (Sri Lanka), Cambridge scholarship preparation, and similar competitive exam tracks.

**Q: What languages can students learn in?**
A: English is universal. Sri Lankan students can also learn in Tamil medium or Sinhala medium. Indian and Maldivian classes are English medium.

**Q: Is EDUS suitable for international students?**
A: Yes. EDUS Global serves students worldwide with one-to-one online tutoring matched to the student's syllabus, time zone, and learning goals.

## Compliance & Safety

- GDPR and App Store privacy compliant.
- Child safeguarding policy enforced for all live classes.
- All tutors are vetted on subject knowledge, teaching ability, and student-handling.
- Classes conducted only on approved platforms (Google Meet, Google Classroom).
- No private collection of student contacts outside EDUS.
